mapper.insert: insert into shopping_cart (name, user_id, dish_id, setmeal_id, dish_flavor, number, amount, image, create_time) values (#{name}, #{userId}, #{dishId}, #{setmealId}, #{dishFlavor}, #{number}, #{amount}, #{image}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select * from shopping_cart where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc
